```{r qc-summary-table}
if (is.null(qc)) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-warning}\nQC data not available for this sample.\n:::\n")
} else {
  # Define QC thresholds for pass/fail
  qc_thresholds <- list(
    total_reads       = list(value = qc$total_reads %||% NA,       threshold = 1e6,  direction = "gte", label = "Total Reads"),
    mapped_reads_pct  = list(value = qc$mapped_reads_pct %||% NA,  threshold = 95,   direction = "gte", label = "Mapped Reads (%)"),
    mean_coverage     = list(value = qc$mean_coverage %||% NA,     threshold = 200,  direction = "gte", label = "Mean Target Coverage"),
    on_target_pct     = list(value = qc$on_target_pct %||% NA,     threshold = 80,   direction = "gte", label = "On-Target Rate (%)"),
    tumor_purity      = list(value = qc$tumor_purity %||% NA,      threshold = 20,   direction = "gte", label = "Tumor Purity (%)"),
    duplicate_pct     = list(value = qc$duplicate_pct %||% NA,     threshold = 30,   direction = "lte", label = "Duplicate Rate (%)"),
    insert_size_mean  = list(value = qc$insert_size_mean %||% NA,  threshold = 100,  direction = "gte", label = "Mean Insert Size (bp)")
  )

  # Build the QC table
  qc_table <- purrr::map_dfr(qc_thresholds, function(item) {
    val <- item$value
    if (is.na(val)) {
      status <- "N/A"
    } else if (item$direction == "gte") {
      status <- if (val >= item$threshold) "PASS" else "FAIL"
    } else {
      status <- if (val <= item$threshold) "PASS" else "FAIL"
    }

    tibble(
      Metric    = item$label,
      Value     = if (is.na(val)) "—" else format(round(val, 1), big.mark = ","),
      Threshold = paste(
        if (item$direction == "gte") "\u2265" else "\u2264",
        format(item$threshold, big.mark = ",")
      ),
      Status    = status
    )
  }) |>
    filter(Value != "—")

  qc_table |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Sequencing Quality Metrics**")
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#ffffff"),
        cell_fill(color = "#2e7d32")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = Status,
        rows = Status == "PASS"
      )
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(weight = "bold", color = "#ffffff"),
        cell_fill(color = "#c62828")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = Status,
        rows = Status == "FAIL"
      )
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(
        cell_text(color = "#9e9e9e"),
        cell_fill(color = "#f5f5f5")
      ),
      locations = cells_body(
        columns = Status,
        rows = Status == "N/A"
      )
    ) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = c(Value, Threshold, Status)) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fafafa"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(qc_table), by = 2))
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(80),
      table.font.size = px(13),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
      table.border.top.width = px(3)
    )
}
```
